user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter employee optional holiday requests by period using From and To dates, so that I can review requests for a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When I select a From and To date and click Search; Then only requests within that period are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter requests by status (Pending with me, Pending approval, Approved, Rejected), so that I can focus on requests needing my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When I select a status such as Pending with me; Then only requests in that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter requests by department and employee class, so that I can narrow results to a specific group of employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When I choose a department and employee class and click Search; Then only matching employees' requests are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle between active and inactive employees, so that I can include or exclude former employees from the results
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list reflects the chosen employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset all filters, so that I can clear my selections and start a new search
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their default values

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view each request with holiday name, date, day and status in a list, so that I can understand the details of each optional holiday request
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Optional Holiday Requests screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows employee name, employee class, holiday name, date, day and status
